Home.title: Hi, I'm Caio Peixoto
Home.subtitle: I build a few useful things that almost always work.
Home.description: This site is my little lab of tools for everyday life.
Home.aboutBody: I like solving problems (classic firefighter) and trying out new ideas.

highlights.title: Firefighter
highlights.desc: Puts out fires, fixes bugs and saves the day.

highlights.title: Always up for it
highlights.desc: Refactor, new language or legacy code? I'm in.

highlights.title: Team buddy
highlights.desc: From shy dev to tech lead, coach, mentor, therapist, you name it.

highlights.title: Last to turn off the lights
highlights.desc: Almost 24/7, always around to help with SQL, infra, planning, moving boxes, making coffee, etc.

timeline.text: Started high school integrated with an IT technician course.
Interned in IT at Centro Universitário São Camilo.
Started a degree in Information Systems at Multivix College.
Started working as a Web Developer at FK-Tech.
Joined Técnica Automação as software support.
Graduated from college and got married.
Moved to Santa Catarina and started working as a Developer at Havan S.A.
Started working as a Tech Leader at Questor Sistemas.
Completed a postgraduate degree in Software Engineering at Faculdade Metropolitana.
Currently working as a Full Stack Developer at Havan S.A. (coming back home).

objective.title: Professional objective
objective.body: Work on improving and optimizing processes and services, using analytical thinking to solve problems and pursue innovations that deliver better customer experiences. I'm passionate about learning and exploring emerging technologies and I'm open to relocating.

experience.title: Havan S.A. — Software Developer
bullets: Back-end Software Engineer on the Research & Development (R&D) team, building scalable and intelligent solutions with .NET, Python and Generative AI.
Help evolve the architecture of internal platforms, applying modern engineering practices to deliver faster, more stable and efficient systems.
Develop high-performance APIs, services and integrations, applying DDD, Clean Architecture, SOLID, automated tests and decoupling patterns.
Also work directly on intelligent workflows with LLMs, OpenAI API, MCP Server and pgvector, using AI to automate corporate processes and reduce operating costs.

experience.title: Questor Sistemas — Tech Leader
bullets: Ongoing system development focused on performance and optimization.
Participation in technology planning and technical support for the team.
Agile-based routine, delivering quality with less time and cost.

experience.title: Havan S.A. — Software Developer
bullets: Back end with .NET Core, DDD, microservices and integrations with RabbitMQ.
Front-end support (AngularJS) and migration to ReactJS.
SQL Server and MongoDB, creating queries, views, functions and stored procedures.
Technical lead: standards, code review and production deployments.

experience.title: Técnica Automação Comercial — Software Support Technician
bullets: ERP support and development of internal solutions in C#.
Maintenance and management of databases and hardware.
Training users and troubleshooting issues in applications.

experience.title: FK-Tech Telecomunicações — IT Intern
bullets: User support and hardware maintenance.
Web development (HTML, CSS, PHP, JavaScript and databases).
Mikrotik hotspot and API integrations using PHP.

experience.title: Centro Universitário São Camilo — IT Intern
bullets: Hardware maintenance and network support (cabling).
User support and lab organization.
Helping teachers set up equipment and lab structures.
